mapper.select:
select q.id, q.title, u.name as advisor, q.is_public from question q join user u on u.id = q.advisor_id where q.advisor_id = #{userId} and q.parent_id = 0 and q.is_deleted = 0
and (q.title like concat('%', #{content}, '%') or q.content like concat('%', #{content}, '%'))

select q.id, q.title, u.name as advisor from question q join user u on u.id = q.advisor_id where q.is_public = 1 and q.parent_id = 0 and q.is_deleted = 0
and (q.title like concat('%', #{content}, '%') or q.content like concat('%', #{content}, '%'))
